steps.title: Identify what the blank must logically connect
steps.content: The first sentence says Zhao made Academy Award history when she won in 2021. The second sentence explains why that win was historic: only one other woman (Bigelow) had ever been named best director before her. The blank introduces that prior context, so it needs a transition that signals temporal anteriority — something that happened before Zhao’s win.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices, confirm the match
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘As a result,’: Signals a consequence of Zhao’s win — but Bigelow’s win preceded Zhao’s, so it could not be a result of it. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘Previously,’: Correctly signals that Bigelow’s win occurred before Zhao’s, framing the historical rarity that makes Zhao’s win significant. ✓
  • Choice C — ‘However,’: Signals contrast or contradiction — there is nothing in the first sentence to contrast with the fact that Bigelow had won before. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘Likewise,’: Signals a parallel or similarity — but Zhao making history and Bigelow having won are not parallel occurrences; one explains the rarity of the other. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
